text.text: The function-oriented structure contains =WP1 Liquid Transport, =WC1 Power Supply, =FC1 Protection, and =QA1 Switching.
The product-oriented structure contains -UC1 Cabinet, -QA1 Circuit Breaker, and -Q1 Contacts.
The location-oriented structure contains +B1 Building, +S3 Floor, and +R2 Room.
The cabinet -UC1 Cabinet in +B1 Building +S3 Floor +R2 Room supports =WP1 Liquid Transport =WC1 Power Supply.
The circuit breaker -UC1 Cabinet -QA1 Circuit Breaker in +B1 Building +S3 Floor +R2 Room performs =WP1 Liquid Transport =WC1 Power Supply =FC1 Protection.
The circuit breaker -UC1 Cabinet -QA1 Circuit Breaker in +B1 Building +S3 Floor +R2 Room performs =WP1 Liquid Transport =WC1 Power Supply =QA1 Switching.
From the function aspect, the object part =WP1 Liquid Transport =WC1 Power Supply =FC1 Protection / -UC1 Cabinet -QA1 Circuit Breaker identifies the protection part of the circuit breaker.
From the function aspect, the object part =WP1 Liquid Transport =WC1 Power Supply =QA1 Switching / -UC1 Cabinet -QA1 Circuit Breaker identifies the switching part of the circuit breaker.
From the location aspect, the object part -UC1 Cabinet / +B1 Building +S3 Floor +R2 Room identifies the cabinet in the room.
The contacts -Q1 Contacts are a part of -QA1 Circuit Breaker inside -UC1 Cabinet.
The product hierarchy is -UC1 Cabinet, then -QA1 Circuit Breaker, then -Q1 Contacts.
The location hierarchy is +B1 Building, then +S3 Floor, then +R2 Room.
The subsystem represented by -UC1 Cabinet is an auxiliary electrical assembly associated with =WP1 Liquid Transport.
Within the function-oriented structure, =WC1 Power Supply is a subfunction of =WP1 Liquid Transport.
Within the function-oriented structure, =FC1 Protection belongs to =WP1 Liquid Transport =WC1 Power Supply.
Within the function-oriented structure, =QA1 Switching belongs to =WP1 Liquid Transport =WC1 Power Supply.
The cabinet -UC1 Cabinet contains the product -QA1 Circuit Breaker.
The circuit breaker -UC1 Cabinet -QA1 Circuit Breaker contains the product -Q1 Contacts.
The cabinet -UC1 Cabinet is installed in +B1 Building +S3 Floor +R2 Room.
The circuit breaker -UC1 Cabinet -QA1 Circuit Breaker is installed in +B1 Building +S3 Floor +R2 Room.
In this strict example, -UC1 Cabinet -QA1 Circuit Breaker is the device that implements =WP1 Liquid Transport =WC1 Power Supply =FC1 Protection.
In this strict example, -UC1 Cabinet -QA1 Circuit Breaker is the device that implements =WP1 Liquid Transport =WC1 Power Supply =QA1 Switching.
In this strict example, -Q1 Contacts are modeled only as a product part of -QA1 Circuit Breaker and not as an independent functional performer.
A cabinet located in +B1 Building +S3 Floor +R2 Room contains the breaker that provides switching and protection for the power supply path related to =WP1 Liquid Transport.
This subsystem is located in +R2 Room on +S3 Floor of +B1 Building and supports the liquid transport power supply chain.
